3086740.name: GAMING RAIDING
3086740.description:
A third-person shooter adventure game set in Japan in the near future.
※There are some combat elements too

STORY

Synopsis
In the year 20XX, a world where professional gamers have become a hugely popular profession by controlling androids and keeping the peace.

The protagonist is an ordinary young man with poor dynamic vision, who is a dropout at gaming school and always plays noob in matches.

He barely makes ends meet to pay his monthly internet bills and works as a game tester while aiming to become a professional gamer.

However, in his childhood, the protagonist had a dream of becoming a professional gamer with his best friend, who is already a professional gamer.

One day during these poor days, an incident occurs to the protagonist and the story begins.

Combat system and objectives
With a third-person shooter feel, the protagonist can launch slashing attacks that send enemies flying, or approach distant enemies in one fell swoop and deliver heavy blows that smash them to pieces. He will face off against giant enemies one after another, improving his playing skills as a pro gamer, and ultimately becoming champion in e-sports - this is the protagonist's goal and a promise he made to his best friend.
3086740.supported_languages:
英语, 日语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
